## Checklist

- [ ] Restart & Run All — the notebook runs clean top-to-bottom; committed outputs match the code
- [ ] `notebook-reviewer` agent run; Blockers cleared (or checklist walked manually)
- [ ] No secrets in any code cell, output cell, or committed file
- [ ] Only files I own are touched (or the owner signed off)
- [ ] Any shared-constant change is a team decision logged in `docs/decisions.md`
- [ ] Handoff artifacts written match this notebook's row in `notebooks/README.md`
